# Yasiru's Portfolio

> Macro-financial research & Sri Lankan markets

This is the personal portfolio and research blog of Yasiru, a 21-year-old researcher based in Colombo, Sri Lanka. He works at the DAV Lab at University of Colombo building macro-financial models with Central Bank data.

## Pages

- Home: https://yasiru.elfbane.com/
- About: https://yasiru.elfbane.com/about
- Blog — The Sri Lankan Banking Thesis: https://yasiru.elfbane.com/blog/sri-lankan-banking-thesis

## Blog Posts

### The Sri Lankan Banking Thesis: A Closer Look
URL: https://yasiru.elfbane.com/blog/sri-lankan-banking-thesis
Category: Macroeconomics
Date: March 2026

An in-depth examination of the viral investment thesis around HNB and COMB on the Colombo Stock Exchange. Covers the credit cycle (net credit to private sector collapsing to -48B LKR in 2023, rebounding to 2.1T in 2025), the formalization thesis (CEFTS growing from 8% to 67% of transactions), NPL risks, CSE liquidity analysis, and valuation considerations. Includes original charts sourced from CBSL Annual Reports, EconomyNext, and CBSL Payments Bulletins.
